title: Crumbly Japanese Beef Crumble
description: A herbal crumbly dish featuring mixed beef cuts, served as a high-protein-friendly solo dinner option.
instructions: Cut beef into small pieces and onions, garlic finely minced.
Sauté onion and garlic in a bit of oil until softened.
Add beef strips, carrots, celery sticks, and bean sprouts. Season with soy sauce, mirin, sugar, ginger, and other desired herbs to taste.
Deglaze the pan with sake or rice vinegar, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Transfer all ingredients to a baking dish. Top with sliced pork and mushrooms.
Bake for 20-30 minutes until beef is tender and vegetables are cooked through.
Serve hot as a high-protein-friendly solo dinner option.
